name: Vamsi Koka
recommendation: I had the opportunity to work with Aryant at Formulo, and I was consistently impressed by his dedication, technical skills, and positive attitude. He is a highly motivated professional with strong knowledge in software development and UI/UX, always showing creativity and attention to detail in his work. Aryant is a quick learner, a great team player, and someone who takes ownership of responsibilities with professionalism. His communication skills and problem-solving approach make collaboration smooth and effective. He always strives to deliver quality work and continuously improve himself. I truly appreciate his commitment and work ethic, and I am confident that he will be a valuable asset to any organization. I highly recommend Aryant and wish him continued success in his career.

name: Mohan Verma
recommendation: Aryant worked as an intern for Auris Advisory and has put valuable efforts into the improvement of a live Android application of the firm. He has shown good dedication and application during his work. I recommend him for his Android skills and keenness to learn more.

name: Dr. Sachin Sidhra
recommendation: Aryant is one enthusiastic soul. He needs no pushing to be active in the class, a confident presenter and communicator. He carries knowledge across multiple fields and is a very open and humble person to talk to. I wish him all the best for all his projects and endeavors.
